item.title: Hard Disk Data Recover [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Hard Disk Data Recover [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: harddiskdata
item.itunes:summary:
Hard Disk Data Recover
(Utilities)
www.pendriverepair.com website recommends technical Hard Disk Data Recovery software to rescue all lost data from damaged and accidentally formatted USB digital storage devices. File retrieval application is created to regain corrupted audio and video clips from logically crashed hard disk.

[read more]

item.title: Android Files Repair Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Android Files Repair Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrepair
item.itunes:summary:
Android Files Repair Software
(Utilities)
Go to www.memorycardrepair.com website and easily see how you can download Android Files Repair Software for your personal use to get back your precious wedding images, baby’s first step video, birthday party images, award winning photos and many more. Data recovery for android device supports android mobile phone, Smartphone, Tablet and PC to regain formatted files.

item.title: Recover Digital Camera Pictures [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover Digital Camera Pictures [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filesrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Recover Digital Camera Pictures
(Utilities)
Install Recover Digital Camera Pictures software offers user to repair relevant photographs and other data from line-scan camera damaged due to logical corruption in minimal time. Digital camcorder snap rescue utility helps user to regain images lost from digital storage camera smashed due to human error in simple manner. Photograph retrieval tool helps user to regain wallpapers and images from novelty camera crashed due to improper usage with no technical help needed.

[read more]

item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
eric

Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".

item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK: Unleash the Power of Gaming on Android! Experience the ultimate gaming performance on your Android device with the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK. This powerful and intuitive launcher optimizes your gaming experience, offering enhanced graphics, smooth gameplay, and customizable settings. Elevate your gaming sessions with advanced features such as game boosting, performance optimization, and seamless compatibility with a wide range of popular titles. Download the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK from revWhiteShadow on a gaming adventure like never before!"

item.title: Calibre [Ebook Software]
item.itunes:title: Calibre [Ebook Software]
item.itunes:author: kushagrakarira
item.itunes:summary:
Calibre
(Ebook Software)
Calibre (/ˈkælɪbər/, stylised calibre) is a cross-platform free and open-source suite of e-book software. Calibre supports organizing existing e-books into virtual libraries, displaying, editing, creating and converting e-books, as well as syncing e-books with a variety of e-readers. Editing books is supported for EPUB and AZW3 formats. Books in other formats like MOBI must first be converted to those formats, if they are to be edited.

[read more]
item.description:

Calibre supports organizing existing e-books into virtual libraries, displaying, editing, creating and converting e-books, as well as syncing e-books with a variety of e-readers. Editing books is supported for EPUB and AZW3 formats. Books in other formats like MOBI must first be converted to those formats, if they are to be edited.

[read more]

Calibre (/ˈkælɪbər/, stylised calibre) is a cross-platform free and open-source suite of e-book software. Calibre supports organizing existing e-books into virtual libraries, displaying, editing, creating and converting e-books, as well as syncing e-books with a variety of e-readers. Editing books is supported for EPUB and AZW3 formats. Books in other formats like MOBI must first be converted to those formats, if they are to be edited.
